data.title: Kodiak Sciences to Present Pipeline Advances and KSI-101 Clinical Data, Including Results from a MESI Cohort in a Tertiary Care Uveitis Practice, at Upcoming Scientific Conferences
data.description: The clinical findings of KSI-101 in treating macular edema secondary to inflammation (MESI) at a specialized uveitis facility show outcomes aligning with those of the U.S. Phase 1b APEX trial. This supports the ongoing worldwide progress and extension of the Phase 3 PEAK and PINNACLE studies, showcasing promising results in treating this condition.

data.title: Victory Square Technologies Reports Fiscal 2025 Results Highlighting Platform Scaling, Healthcare Infrastructure Growth and Portfolio Momentum
data.description: In recent news, Hydreight has achieved significant growth and profitability, with VSDHOne expanding its operations nationwide. Additionally, Victory Square is making strides in its plan to develop, expand, and capitalize on platform-based enterprises focusing on healthcare, artificial intelligence, and emerging technologies. These advancements were reported from Vancouver, BC on May 1, 2026.

data.title: Global Real Assets Trust Reports Q4 & Year End 2025 Results
data.description: Starlight Investments Capital GP Inc., representing Global Real Assets Trust, reported the Trust's financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and full year of 2025. As of December 31, 2025, the Trust's investments included $188,799,591 in the four Private Portfolio LPs (compared to $253,961 in December 31, 2024), and investments of $25,171,937 and $11,544,8 in the Public Equity LP.

data.title: Argo Corporation Reports Fiscal Year 2025 Financial Results
data.description: On April 30, 2026, Argo Corporation (TSXV: ARGH) (OTCQX: ARGHF), a top provider of innovative transit solutions, disclosed its audited financial performance for the fiscal year that wrapped up on December 31, 2025. The amounts stated are in Canadian dollars, with specific numerical data undisclosed in this version.

data.title: NIO Inc. Provides April 2026 Delivery Update
data.description: In Shanghai on May 1, 2026, NIO Inc. revealed its April 2026 delivery figures, solidifying its position as a frontrunner in the worldwide smart electric vehicle sector. The company's stock is listed on NYSE as NIO, on HKEX as 9866, and on SGX as NIO.

data.title: The Ad Council and NHTSA Prevent Hot Car Deaths with New PSAs for "Never Happens" Campaign and Richard Scarry Partnership
data.description: In support of National Heatstroke Prevention Day, a recent campaign is urging parents and caregivers to never leave their children unattended in a vehicle. On May 1, 2026, the Ad Council and the National Highway Traffic Safety Administration (NHTSA) launched new Public Service Announcements (PSAs) to raise awareness about the dangers of heatstroke. The initiative emphasizes the importance of safeguarding children from extreme heat in cars. This effort aims to reduce the number of heatstroke-related incidents involving children, which stands at an average of over 50 fatalities annually in the U.S. The campaign stresses the significance of vigilance and responsible actions to prevent tragic outcomes, promoting a safer environment for kids during hot weather.

data.title: Apple, Exxon Mobil And 3 Stocks To Watch Heading Into Friday
data.description: U.S. stock futures are up today, with Exxon Mobil Corp. (NYSE: XOM) expected to report earnings of $1.15 per share on revenue of $82.18 billion. After-hours trading saw Exxon Mobil shares rise 0.6% to $155.25. Meanwhile, Apple Inc. (NASDAQ: AAPL) surpassed expectations in its second quarter, reporting revenue of $111.18 billion, a 17% increase from the previous year. Apple also provided strong guidance for the June quarter. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.
